tagline: Modern dental care in central Stockholm
heroTitle: Professional dental care with a personal touch
heroSubtitle: We help patients with modern dental treatments in a calm and welcoming environment.
heroText: We help patients with modern dental treatments in a calm and welcoming environment.
aboutText: Nordic Smile Dental offers preventive and cosmetic dentistry for families and professionals in Stockholm.

services.title: Dental Cleaning
services.description: Professional cleaning to maintain healthy teeth and gums.

services.title: Teeth Whitening
services.description: Safe and effective whitening treatments for a brighter smile.

faq.question: Do you accept emergency appointments?
faq.answer: Yes, please call us directly for emergency availability.

faq.question: How do I book an appointment?
faq.answer: You can use our booking link or contact us by phone.

chatbot.name: Dental Assistant
chatbot.welcome: Hej! Jag är Nordic Smile Dentals digitala assistent. Hur kan jag hjälpa dig idag?
